name: Frango Mint Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together butter and powdered sugar in a large bowl until fluffy.
2. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate.
3. Add melted chocolate to butter mixture and beat thoroughly.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Fold in peppermint and vanilla extracts.
6. Line an 8-inch pie tin with vanilla wafer crumbs (buttering the tin will help them stick).
7. Pour filling into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate for 2 hours.
